steps.title: State the constraints
steps.content:
Every pair (x, y) in the table must satisfy both conditions simultaneously:
• y < x
• x < 22

steps.title: Eliminate choices with x ≥ 22
steps.content: Choices C and D have x-values of 23, 24, 25. All violate x < 22. Both eliminated.

steps.title: Evaluate each remaining choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — (19,18), (20,19), (21,20): Every row: y = x−1 < x ✓, and x ∈ {19,20,21} all < 22 ✓. All three pairs satisfy both inequalities. ✓
  • Choice B — (19,20), (20,21), (21,22): First row: y = 20 > x = 19, violates y < x. ✗
  • Choice C — (23,22), (24,23), (25,24): x-values 23, 24, 25 all violate x < 22. ✗
  • Choice D — (23,24), (24,25), (25,26): x-values 23, 24, 25 all violate x < 22, and y > x in every row. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
